text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I can't believe I didn't even place!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you have one second to explain the
reason for these results!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I suppose there's no other explanation. My
abilities are beyond reproach, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But luck is something the strong make for
themselves!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not strong enough to make my own luck yet,
then I simply need to train more.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I give you the right to elevate my luck
and strength to the peaks of perfection!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll accept nothing less than your utmost effort!
Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
F-fine... I really hate to admit it... and by that I
mean I absolutely loathe the idea, but I'll accept
it... for now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, this means that I have even
greater heights to reach if I truly apply myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be able to fly to those heights on my
wings of innate talent!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With wings this powerful, I only require diligent
practice to soar to the pinnacle of perfection!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I am King Halo, and I will never give
up!
